title: Board Sitting Runbook
body: Year end board sitting is held in the Ridgewood Library Learning Commons starting 4:30 PM on 2026-12-17. Setup begins ninety minutes prior. This runbook was last reviewed in late November and reflects the standing arrangement.

title: Hiring and Staffing Freeze Procedure
body: The staffing freeze takes effect 2026-12-15. Postings may proceed to offer until that date. This page predates the December operations change and has not yet been updated.
